metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills for enhanced AI-assisted development workflows.

plugins.name: aitc-workflow
plugins.description: Manually invoked workflow orchestrator for long-running multi-agent batch tasks. Provides Plan, Execute, and Lifecycle modes for team coordination and knowledge capture.

plugins.name: github-pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Automated GitHub PR reviewer that deep-analyzes pull requests and posts structured review feedback with inline comments, suggestions, and an approve/request-changes verdict.

plugins.name: github-pr-fixer
plugins.description: Automated GitHub PR fixer that reads review feedback, implements code fixes, runs tests, and replies to reviewers until all review threads are resolved.

plugins.name: md2pdf
plugins.description: Convert Markdown documents to PDF with CJK/Latin mixed text, fenced code blocks, tables, and clickable TOC. Simplified GitHub Light theme.
